titleStmt.title: SII 9.590: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 590. (A.R. No. 90 of 1912.) ON THE WALL OF THE VERANDAH ROUND THE VIRABHADRA TEMPLE AT LEPAKSHI, HINDUPUR TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1460, Viḷambi, Mārgaśira, ba. 3, Sō[mavāra] corresponding to A.D. 1538 December 8, Sunday (not Monday), in the reign of Achyutadēva-Mahārāya. It records that Penugoṇḍe Virapaṇṇayya along with his brother Vīraṇa purchased some vṛitti lands from certain Brāhmans and made a gift of them for the service of the god Vīrēśvara of Lēpākshi. The vṛittis are stated to have been situated in Nagaragere, surnamed Kṛishṇarāyasamudra, which was situated in Tumbekalla-sthala in Rodda-nāḍu, a sub-division of Penugoṇḍe-rājya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
virapaṁṇamahībhartrā kṛṣṇarāyasamudrakē mahāgrahārē
nagarēgerenāmāntarānvitē krītvā samarpitāḥ kāścit
vrittayōtra vilēkhitāḥ .
svasti śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1460 neya viḷaṁbi
saṁvatsarada mārgaśira ba 3 sōdallū śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara
vīrapratāpa śrīacyutadēvamahārāyaru pṛthvīrājyaṁgaivuttiralū penugoṁ
ḍerājya rodanāḍu tuṁbekalla sthaḷada nagaragerege pratināmavāda kṛṣṇa
rāyasamudraveṁba sarvamānyada Agrahāradallū lēpākṣi vīrē
śvaradēvara Amṛtapaḍi naivēdyagaḷige penugoṁḍe virapaṁṇayanava
rū Ātana taṁma vīraṇanāyakarū krayadānavāgi tekoṁḍu samarpisida vṛttigaḷa vivarā
bhāradvājagōtrada Āśvalāyanasūtrada rukśākheya śrīpati perirājayyagaḷa makaḷu
kuppaṇarsariṁda vṛtti 1 kke kraya varaha ga 150 nūraAyivattu varaha kālabhāvagōtrada Ā
pastaṁbhasūtrada yajuśākheya malagūra rāmarsara makkaḷu śaṁkarayana kaiyyalu
vṛttiṁ . Ardhake kraya varaha ga 75 yappattayidu varaha jāmadagñāvatsagōtra
da bōdhāyanasūtrada yajuśākheya gaṁgādharadīkṣitara makkaḷu kṛṣṇabhaṭṭara kailū
vṛttiṁ . Ardhake kraya varaha ga 75 yappattayidu varaha . Ā gōtrada Ā sūtrada
gaṁgādharadīkṣitara tirumaladīkṣitara makkaḷu gaṁgādharabhaṭṭara kai
llū vṛttiṁ . Ardhakaṁ kraya varaha ga 75 yappattayidu varaha .
Digital edition of SII 9.590 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
